name: fdl-vtal
description: Ferramenta interna FDL VTAL - Geração de massa de testes QA

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run worker" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:local: cross-env APP_PROFILE=local USE_MEMORY_QUEUE=1 concurrently "npm run server" "npm run worker" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:qa: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run worker" "npm run client:dev"
